intro: Between April 14 and April 23, 2026, ZCyberNews published nine articles tracking botnet activity. The threat actors Mirai, The Gentlemen, and W3LL were prominently observed, exploiting vulnerabilities including CVE-2025-29635 (CVSS 8.8), CVE-2024-3721 (CVSS 6.3), and CVE-2023-33538. These campaigns primarily targeted the corporate, finance, and technology sectors, with significant impact also noted across residential networks and multiple other industries. Geographically, incidents ranged from a focus on the Czech republic to global operations. The reported severity of these events was weighted toward high and critical levels, with six high-severity reports, two medium, and one critical.
